message:
feat: Phase 3 - Metal Link tool integration

Add tool registry system connecting Cell Scheduler to external tools:
- Tool Registry (tools.zig): ToolRequest/ToolResult structs, handler dispatch
- Trigger Detection (triggers.zig): State machine for <RUN>, <JS>, <QUERY> tags
- Metal0 Integration (metal0.zig): Python execution via subprocess
- Edgebox Integration (edgebox.zig): JS sandbox execution via subprocess
- LanceQL Integration (lanceql.zig): Vector DB query placeholder
- C API (c_api.zig): Exports for zell_init, zell_predict, zell_deinit
- Scheduler: Tool detection in DISPATCH, pause/resume for tool execution
- Build: Optional shared library target with -Dshared flag
